_meta.task: Resolve EF (ЭФ164189) classic-priced gondola numbers to model+capacity to confirm none are innovative-75т
_meta.summary: All 5 numbers verified as valid 4-axle gondola (полувагон) numbers via the РЖД 8-digit check-digit algorithm. Their leading-digit family (53/55/52) is the classic-gondola block and differs from the EF innovative-75т number family (64/62/60 prefixes), which is consistent with them being priced classic on the receipt. However, the specific MODEL and exact capacity (69.5 vs 70.3т) could NOT be resolved for free: every public number→model service (railwagonlocation tracking, gruzivagon.info check, alta.ru rail_tracking, ЭТРАН/ИВЦЖА registries) is a JS/POST or authenticated dislocation tool, not a GET-resolvable page. railwagonlocation's free /carriage-container-number-check.php is only a control-digit validator and returns no model. gruzivagon.info indexes wagon MODELS by internal id, not individual numbers. The shared Playwright browser was locked by a concurrent agent for the full session, so the JS forms could not be driven.
_meta.checkDigitAlgorithm: weights [2,1,2,1,2,1,2] over first 7 digits; sum digit-of-each-product; control=(10 - sum%10)%10

sources.note: free page = control-digit check only, no model
number check is JS/POST; site indexes models by id, not numbers
rail tracking is a form service, no free GET model resolution
number-system decoder: confirms 4-axle gondola from leading digits, no specific model
